privileged_info_summary: The cabinet side panel task uses synthetically generated specifications embedded in setup_task.sh. All metadata claims have been verified: file paths point to /home/ga/Documents/cabinet_spec.txt and /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/side_panel_cnc.dxf; expected layers are PANEL (color 7), DRILLING (color 1), and DADO (color 4). The specification defines a cabinet panel with dimensions 720mm height × 560mm depth, a toe kick notch of 100mm height × 70mm depth, a back groove 6mm wide at 20mm offset from back edge, and a System 32 drilling pattern with 5mm diameter holes spaced 32mm vertically, starting at 192mm and ending at 650mm, positioned 37mm from edges. All 14 numerical specification values match exactly between task.json metadata and the embedded spec file.
